1.title: ATQ Estimated queue delay
1.query:
timeseries persec = avg(active-directory.atq.server.atqestimatedqueuedelay.persec),
  by: { dt.entity.wmi:com_dynatrace_extension_ad_atq }
| fieldsAdd wmi:com_dynatrace_extension_ad_atq_name = entityName(dt.entity.wmi:com_dynatrace_extension_ad_atq)
| sort arrayAvg(persec) desc
| limit 20

2.title: ATQ Outstanding queued requests total
2.query:
timeseries total = avg(active-directory.atq.server.atqoutstandingqueuedrequests.total),
  by: { dt.entity.wmi:com_dynatrace_extension_ad_atq }
| fieldsAdd wmi:com_dynatrace_extension_ad_atq_name = entityName(dt.entity.wmi:com_dynatrace_extension_ad_atq)
| sort arrayAvg(total) desc
| limit 20
